mapper.select: SELECT m.id AS id, m.msg_type AS type, m.title AS title, m.summary AS summary, m.content AS content, m.sub_type AS subType, m.link_url AS link, m.created_at AS createdAt, (mr.id IS NOT NULL) AS `read` FROM u_message m LEFT JOIN u_message_read mr ON mr.message_id = m.id AND mr.user_id = #{userId} AND mr.is_deleted = 0 WHERE m.is_deleted = 0 AND ( (m.scope = 1 AND m.created_at >= #{registerAt}) OR (m.scope = 2 AND m.target_user_id = #{userId}) ) ORDER BY (mr.id IS NOT NULL) ASC, m.created_at DESC LIMIT 200
SELECT m.id FROM u_message m WHERE m.is_deleted = 0 AND m.id = #{messageId} AND ( (m.scope = 1 AND m.created_at >= #{registerAt}) OR (m.scope = 2 AND m.target_user_id = #{userId}) ) LIMIT 1
